name: ASTA-POOL: The Future of Pool
short_description: It is the year 2629, and you are with your girlfriend at a futuristic game-room called the Asta-Pool Club. To prove you are worthy to play there, you must beat their bots in a variety of action, arcade, puzzle, racing, and pool-themed games. Along the way, you discover the Club's hidden menace!
detailed_description:
"This isn't human night, sir!"

It is the year 2629, and you are with your girlfriend at a futuristic game-room called the Asta-Pool Club. To prove you are worthy to play there, you must beat their bots in a variety of action, arcade, puzzle, racing, and pool-themed games. Along the way, you discover the Club's hidden menace!

Features:

  • Play original, FUTURISTIC pool games like Space 8 and Gravity 8 on ZERO-GRAVITY tables.

  • Prove that humans can still beat bots by completing a challenging CAMPAIGN with 40 unique levels of puzzle, arcade, strategy, and pool games. Each level unlocks another part of the story, bonus games, or other extras.

  • Play advanced pool games where you DRIVE YOUR BALL LIKE A CAR to pocket your balls.

  • Discover sinister secrets and solve the Asta-Pool Club's malevelant mystery as you are entertained by quirky bots in a 40-part, ORIGINAL STORY.

  • Play the TRADITIONAL POOL GAMES, like Ancient 8-ball and Ancient 9-ball.

  • Enjoy over 20 hours of original gameplay/story/extras. Approximately 75 cents per hour of gameplay.

  • Play PUZZLE GAMES like Jumpshot, where you have to jump over every ball in a rack until only one is left.

  • Challenge yourself and show off you skills with 20 ACHIEVEMENTS, like making a bank-shot (on purpose) or beating all 14 levels of Asta-Fours.

  • Play WACKY GAMES like Crazy 8, where you blow up your opponent's balls, shrink them, expand them, make them go backwards, and turn them invisible! And that's just for starters!

  • Immediately play over 30 games with your friends via ONLINE-MULTIPLAYER. It's easy – just host the game you want to play and your friend clicks one button to start it.

  • Save your best shots by clicking the REPLAY button after your shot has completed. (Select games only.)

  • Learn basic pool and TRICK SHOTS via the included TRAINING LEVELS. Perfect for those who know little about pool.

  • Join a TOURNAMENT or HOST A TOURNAMENT for your friends yourself!

  • Take "THE SHARKBOT CHALLENGE" to see if you can beat the Asta-Pool club's best bot! You get an achievement if you can do it twice. (Don't miss!)

  • View an original, 27th-century MUSIC-VIDEO featuring Energy and the hit single, "Broke Me".

  • Use the JukeBot to control different music for each game.

  • Use JokeBot for a different joke each game. (Bot humor is something else!)

  • Get TIPS TO IMPROVE YOUR GAME from Trick-bot.

  • And so much more...

Note:

Asta-Pool was made by a single programmer and took 3 and a half years to develop. It was a labor of love. The physics are accurate and perform well. With over 20 hours of original play-time and extras, this game basically costs 75 cents per hour!
